metadata.title: Infinex — AI That Works for Your Business
metadata.description: Infinex deploys artificial intelligence where it creates the most value — more revenue, less friction in your processes.

hero.title: AI that works for your business.
hero.subtitle: We deploy artificial intelligence where it creates the most value — more revenue, less friction in your processes.

growth.title: Grow your revenue
growth.description: Qualified leads, optimized paid acquisition, automated content, laser-targeted prospecting. We scale your pipeline.

efficiency.title: Cut your operating costs
efficiency.description: Automate repetitive tasks, generate reports in one click, produce documents effortlessly. We free up your teams.

croissance.metaTitle: Grow Your Revenue with AI — Infinex
croissance.metaDescription: Inbound leads, outbound prospecting, content, optimized ads. Discover our AI services to grow your revenue.
croissance.title: Generate more revenue with less human effort.
croissance.subtitle: Inbound leads, outbound prospecting, content at scale, optimized ads. We deploy the right weapons for every stage of your acquisition.
croissance.ctaSubtitle: A 30-minute conversation is all it takes to identify your top 3 AI growth levers.

services.benefit: Free inbound leads, every month
services.how: AI-powered SEO & GEO: we optimize your visibility on Google and AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT…) so prospects find you before your competitors.

services.benefit: Identify your hottest prospects on LinkedIn
services.how: Advanced scraping + AI scoring to target only the decision-makers matching your ICP — no more hours wasted on Sales Navigator.

services.benefit: Fill your calendar with automated cold emailing
services.how: Personalized sequences at scale, data enrichment, and AI A/B testing to maximize open and reply rates.

services.benefit: UGC ads that convert — no filming needed
services.how: AI-generated UGC-style video ads — realistic avatars, optimized scripts, unlimited variations.

services.benefit: A steady stream of carousels for your social channels
services.how: AI-powered dynamic templates: one brief generates dozens of engaging visuals tailored to each platform.

services.benefit: Optimize Google Ads & Meta Ads without the expertise
services.how: AI analysis of your existing campaigns, detection of wasted spend, and optimization recommendations — or fully managed for you.

services.benefit: Dozens of ad creatives in minutes
services.how: Batch generation of static creatives (banners, stories, display) with message variants and formats in a single workflow.

services.benefit: Scale your business into any language
services.how: Translation, cultural adaptation, and SEO deployment in your target markets — your offer localized and conversion-ready.

services.benefit: An AI sales rep on your site, 24/7
services.how: Lead-qualifying chatbot integrated with your CRM: it answers, filters, and scores your prospects while you sleep.

services.benefit: A blog that drives traffic on autopilot
services.how: Content strategy + AI-written SEO articles published automatically — your audience grows without you lifting a finger.

services.benefit: Score your leads and focus on the right ones
services.how: AI model trained on your CRM data to predict conversion probability for each contact — prioritize the deals that close.

services.benefit: Personalized nurturing emails for every contact
services.how: Follow-up sequences adapted to each lead's behavior, written and sent automatically to keep the relationship warm until they decide.

efficacite.metaDescription: Automation, reports, dashboards, training. Discover our AI services to reduce your operating costs.
efficacite.title: Your teams on what matters. AI handles the rest.
efficacite.subtitle: Automate time-consuming tasks, eliminate manual errors, and produce in seconds what used to take hours. Without hiring.
efficacite.ctaSubtitle: In 30 minutes, we identify the processes to automate first and quantify the real gains for your team.

services.benefit: Generate audit reports in a few clicks
services.how: AI pipeline that collects, analyzes, and formats your data into a structured, personalized report — what took 3 hours now takes 10 minutes.

services.benefit: Automate your repetitive admin tasks
services.how: Processing incoming emails, data entry, follow-ups, approvals — everything that repeats is scriptable and delegatable to AI.

services.benefit: A dashboard that's always up to date, effortlessly
services.how: Connect your data sources (CRM, ERP, Sheets…) into an automated dashboard with real-time smart alerts.

services.benefit: Professional PowerPoints generated automatically
services.how: Your data and briefs transformed into structured, on-brand presentations — without opening PowerPoint once.

services.benefit: Your documents formatted in seconds
services.how: Automated formatting (Word, PDF, reports) from your raw content — visual consistency guaranteed without manual effort.

services.benefit: Your teams master Excel & AI tools in weeks
services.how: Hands-on training with Claude as a teaching assistant: personalized exercises, instant answers, and accelerated skill-building.

services.benefit: Automated support that handles 80% of questions
services.how: AI chatbot trained on your knowledge base — handles common requests, escalates complex cases, available 24/7.

services.benefit: Process 3x more emails without hiring
services.how: Automatic classification, reply suggestions, and automated responses for recurring emails — your inbox never overflows.

services.benefit: Extract data from your documents effortlessly
services.how: OCR + AI to read invoices, contracts, forms and automatically populate your tools — no more manual data entry.

services.benefit: Automate your HR onboarding from A to Z
services.how: Contract generation, automatic document sending, reminders and signature tracking — every new hire onboarded in a few clicks.

services.benefit: Analyze your contracts and legal documents in seconds
services.how: AI extraction of key clauses, version comparison, alerts on sensitive points — without mobilizing a lawyer for every read.

services.benefit: Track your competitors and market in real time
services.how: Automated monitoring (pricing, news, social media) compiled weekly into a clear digest — always one step ahead.

getStarted.metaDescription: Tell us your challenge and we'll show you how AI can grow your revenue or cut your costs.
getStarted.title: Tell us where it hurts.
getStarted.subtitle: 30 minutes is all it takes to identify your best AI levers — growth or efficiency.

benefits.title: More revenue, less effort
benefits.description: Qualified leads, automated prospecting, content that converts — we activate the right levers.

benefits.title: Lower costs within weeks
benefits.description: We automate what slows you down: reporting, admin, data entry, follow-ups. Your teams focus on what matters.

benefits.title: Real results, not slide decks
benefits.description: No 6-month audits. We deploy, measure, and iterate. First gains visible in 3 weeks.

form.needsPlaceholder: Tell us about your current challenges and what you'd like to achieve with AI...
form.source: How did you hear about Infinex?
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you very soon.

blog.metaDescription: AI strategies, automation, training: actionable insights for SMBs.
blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Actionable strategies to integrate AI into your business.

postCta.title: Ready to take action?
postCta.description: Let's discuss your project and define your AI strategy together.

formationUgc.metaDescription: Learn to create high-converting UGC ads with generative AI. Half-day remote training, 500 EUR excl. VAT.
formationUgc.title: Create UGC ads that convert, no camera needed.
formationUgc.subtitle: In half a day, master AI tools to produce realistic UGC video ads — avatars, scripts, variations — and launch your first campaigns by tomorrow.

problem.title: Traditional UGC is expensive and slow
problem.description: Shoots, actors, editing, iterations... Producing quality UGC videos requires a budget of thousands and weeks of production. Not to mention the difficulty of scaling: every variation needs a new shoot.

solution.title: Generative AI changes everything
solution.description: With the right tools and techniques, you can generate realistic UGC videos in minutes. Convincing avatars, conversion-optimized scripts, unlimited variations. All without a camera, actor, or studio.

program.title: What you will learn
program.subtitle: A dense, 100% actionable program designed so you can produce your first AI UGC ads by the end of the training.

items.title: High-performing UGC fundamentals
items.description: Anatomy of a UGC ad that converts: hooks, script structures, psychological patterns, and benchmarks by industry.

items.title: Master AI video generation tools
items.description: Create your AI avatars from scratch: generate realistic photos, turn them into video, animate with sound and lip sync. Your avatars say exactly the script you want.

items.title: Write scripts that sell
items.description: Copywriting frameworks adapted to UGC format. Using ChatGPT/Claude to generate and iterate optimized scripts.

items.title: Produce and scale variations
items.description: Complete workflow: from brief to final video. Reusable templates, audience-specific variations, creative A/B testing.

audience.title: This training is for you if...

items.title: Marketing / Growth Manager
items.description: You want to scale your ad creative production without blowing your budget.

items.title: SMB Owner
items.description: You want to launch video campaigns without relying on an agency or studio.

items.title: Freelancer / Consultant
items.description: You want to add AI UGC creation to your service offering.

items.title: Community Manager
items.description: You need to produce video content regularly with limited resources.

carousel.title: Stunning results
carousel.subtitle: Here are examples of AI-generated UGC ads, like the ones you will learn to create during the training.

details.title: Practical details
details.sessionNote: Next session available as early as next week. We run a session every week — pick the date that works for you.

formSection.title: Reserve your spot
formSection.description: Sign up yourself or a team member for the next AI UGC training session. Limited seats to ensure personalized guidance.

form.successDetail: We will get back to you within 24 hours with the next session details.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or reach out to us directly.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy and data protection for the infinex.studio website.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.content:
EI Meidy BAFFOU
SIRET: 80473268300045
Email: contact@makeitglobal-agency.com

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We only collect data that you submit through our contact form: first name, last name, email, phone number, company, job title, revenue range, and services of interest. No data is collected automatically beyond standard server logs.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: Your data is used to respond to your inquiries, follow up for commercial purposes, and improve our services. We never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.

storage.title: Data Hosting and Storage
storage.content: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (USA). Form submissions are stored in Google Sheets (Google LLC, USA) for commercial follow-up and transmitted via Telegram Bot API for internal notifications. These services comply with GDPR through Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is retained for the duration of the business relationship and for a maximum of 3 years after the last contact. You may request deletion at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.content: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port, and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise your rights, contact us at contact@makeitglobal-agency.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: This website does not use advertising cookies or third-party trackers. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be used for the website to function properly.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: The website uses Google Analytics for audience measurement. This data is anonymized and cannot be used to personally identify you. You can disable tracking through your browser settings.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use for the infinex.studio website.
terms.title: Terms of Use

object.title: Purpose
object.content: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the infinex.studio website, published by EI Meidy BAFFOU (SIRET: 80473268300045). By using this website, you fully accept these terms.

services.title: Services Description
services.content: Infinex provides AI consulting services for SMBs: AI audit and strategy, automation deployment, and team training. The website allows you to discover our offerings, read our articles, and contact us through the dedicated form.

access.title: Website Access
access.content: The website is freely accessible to any user with an Internet connection. The publisher reserves the right to suspend or interrupt access for maintenance or updates, without prior notice or compensation.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content on this website (text, images, logos, graphics, videos) is protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction or use is prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The publisher strives to provide accurate information on the website. However, it cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or results obtained from using this information. The website is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.

modifications.title: Changes to Terms
modifications.content: The publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the website. Continued use of the website after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.content: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of the website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.
